debt_maturity_schedule: 2026: $5.9B fixed, $0B variable; 2027: $5.0B fixed, $0B variable; 2028: $5.7B fixed, $0B variable; 2029: $4.8B fixed, $0.1B variable; 2030: $4.8B fixed, $0.1B variable; Thereafter: $75.4B fixed, $3.0B variable
swap_rates: 2026: pay 6.1%, receive 3.3%; 2027: pay 5.9%, receive 3.6%; 2028: pay 6.4%, receive 4.2%; Overall: pay 6.2%, receive 3.7%
fair_values: Fixed-rate debt fair value: $87.1B as of December 31, 2025; Variable-rate debt fair value: $3.2B; Fixed-to-Variable swaps fair value: $(0.1)B
foreign_currency_exposure: British pound, euro, Japanese yen, and Chinese yuan
hedge_designation_types: Fair value hedges, cash flow hedges, and net investment hedges. Specific designations include: cross-currency swaps as fair value and cash flow hedges for foreign currency debt; foreign currency forwards as fair value hedges on intercompany loans receivable; foreign currency denominated debt and cross-currency swaps as hedges of net investments in subsidiaries.
fx_sensitivity_analysis: A hypothetical 10% shift in currency exchange rates, inclusive of the effects of derivatives, would not have a material impact on 2025 net income attributable to Comcast Corporation.
collateral_requirements: As of December 31, 2025 and 2024, the company was not required to post collateral under the terms of these agreements, nor did it hold any collateral under the terms of these agreements.
